channel.title: essay on origamizyt 的博客
channel.description: Recent content in essay on origamizyt 的博客

item.title: Getting to the top - Voice from a Curve Wrecker
item.description: As a student in class 10, I’m surrounded by eminent learners and suffering from a considerable amount of peer pressure. I have neither courage nor evidence to declare myself as a Curve Wrecker, that is, one of the top students in class. However, Wang Mohan definitely merits this entitlement, as I am nobody compared to his altitude in attainments and depth in soul. Being a Curve Wrecker, Wang does not display any sign of pride but only modesty, enabling him to maintain a clear mind in his study.
